checks.description: Audit log retention period is 180 days or more
Audit log destination is the SIEM

description: Compiled from RIA briefing 2026-14012, remediation action A3. Retention bound and destination are both required; retention without SIEM delivery leaves the record unreviewable and does not satisfy the control.
title: Audit log retention is at least 180 days with delivery to the SIEM
